meta.siteTagline: Preserving legacies through cinematic documentary film

hero.headline: Will your grandchildren know your story?

slideshowSection.header: Preserving a loved one's legacy in a documentary film that connects the past with the future.

pairs.copy: 50 years from now, a great-grandchild will press play. What will they see?
Can you say you truly know their story?

packagesSection.sectionSubtitle: A complete documentary package designed to capture your family's story with the craft and care it deserves.
packagesSection.inclusionNote: Everything listed above is included in every documentary. Additional services (multi-day shoots, drone footage, custom animations, archival research, and more) are available as add-ons tailored to your specific vision.

customizable.label: Fully Customizable
customizable.subtitle: Based on your vision, we can shape the experience with any combination of these elements. Tell us your story, and we will help you choose exactly what you need.
customizable.closingNote: We are happy to walk you through any of these options during your consultation and help you choose exactly what fits your story.

processSection.sectionSubtitle: A guided journey from discovery to delivery. We handle every detail so you can focus on what matters most: sharing your legacy.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.subtitle: Questionnaire and consultation
steps.description: We begin with a heartfelt conversation to understand your family's unique story and what matters most to you.

steps.title: Quote and Payment
steps.subtitle: Transparent pricing
steps.description: We provide a clear, detailed quote with no hidden fees, making the investment simple and straightforward.

steps.title: Pre-Production
steps.subtitle: Story outline and planning
steps.description: We develop a detailed outline to structure your narrative with editorial care and attention to detail.

steps.title: Production
steps.subtitle: Interviews and filming
steps.description: We capture your story through professional interviews and cinematic footage, conducted with sensitivity and care.

steps.title: Editing and Revisions
steps.subtitle: Narrative craft and feedback
steps.description: We shape the narrative, integrate archival material, and perfect every element of the audio-visual experience.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.subtitle: Final film and heirlooms
steps.description: We deliver the finished film along with your selected heirlooms and archival assets, ready to be passed down.

items.question: When is the best time to do this?
items.answer: The best films aren't made under pressure. They're made when your loved one has the energy, the clarity, and the joy to really tell their story. Don't wait for a health scare to be the reason you finally do this.

items.question: What will actually be in the film?
items.answer: A feature-length documentary, around 90 minutes, built around a real, structured interview process. We help your loved one shape their life into a narrative: the chapters, the turning points, the things they've never quite found the words to say. You'll also receive a physical heirloom book and a full digital archive. Something to watch, and something to hold.

items.question: How do you get someone to open up on camera?
items.answer: That's exactly what we're trained for. Long before filming begins, we conduct pre-interviews and story coaching to help your loved one figure out what they want to say and how to say it. By the time the cameras are on, it doesn't feel like an interview. It feels like a conversation they've been waiting to have.

items.question: How is this different from a home video?
items.answer: A home video captures a moment. We capture a life. Our team of producers, writers, and filmmakers shapes everything, the narrative arc, the pacing, the visuals, into something that actually feels like a film worth watching again and again, not just once at a holiday dinner.

items.question: How long does the whole process take?
items.answer: Most LifeStory Films take three to four weeks from start to delivery. A lot happens behind the scenes: story development, photo scanning, filming, and editing. We guide you through every step, and we never rush what matters.

items.question: Do you travel outside of New York?
items.answer: We're based in Brooklyn and serve all of Metropolitan New York. For the right project, we're happy to travel. Just reach out and we'll figure it out together.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Call, text, or email, whatever's easiest for you. There's no pressure and no commitment in the first conversation. Just tell us a little about who you want to film, and we'll take it from there.

footer.tagline: Every life deserves to be remembered.
footer.location: Based in Brooklyn, NY. Serving all of Metropolitan New York.
